name: Sweet Potato Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 small sweet potato, baked, peeled and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a mixing bowl and baking sheet.
2. In a mixing bowl, whisk the yeast and water together until the yeast dissolves.
3. Add in the sugar, salt, pepper, and butter. Mix well and let rest for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in the eggs and sweet potatoes. Mix the flour and raisins together.
5. Fold in the flour, 1/2 cup at a time, working with your hands until all the flour is incorporated.
6. Form the dough into a small ball and sprinkle the dough with the remaining tablespoon of flour.
7. Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, turning the dough once to cover with the oil. Cover the bowl with a clean cloth and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 1/2 hours.
8. Punch the dough down and roll into an oval loaf about 8x3 inches. Place the loaf in the center of the prepared baking sheet.
9. Cover and let rise until double in size, about 45 minutes.
10. Bake the bread for about 40 minutes, or until golden. Remove the bread from the oven and transfer to a wire rack. Let cool. Slice and serve with butter.
